channel.title: Wheel Strategy on pras.io
channel.description: Recent content in Wheel Strategy on pras.io

item.title: The Wheel Strategy, Part 1: Understanding Options from the Ground Up
item.description: Before you can run the wheel, you need to understand what you're actually doing when you trade options. This is Part 1 of a 3-part series — no hand-holding, just the fundamentals done right.

item.title: The Wheel Strategy, Part 2: Selling Puts — The Entry Side
item.description: The put side of the wheel is where your income generation begins. Here's how to select a strike, size a position, collect premium, and manage the trade — including when things don't go to plan.
